abilities.name: Drawing Strength
abilities.description: Once per session during a short rest, you may describe your Digimon performing a new technique you imagined for them. Until the next long rest your Digimon gains access to one additional move from their pool as a fifth active slot — it does not replace their signature move or any of their three learned moves. The move must be one your Digimon has access to at their current stage.

abilities.name: Never Give Up
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon would fail an attack roll by 3 or less — falling just short of the hit threshold — the attack grazes. A graze deals half normal damage, bypasses no defences, and triggers no additional effects.

abilities.name: Gogglehead's Resolve
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Courage rank 4
abilities.description: When your Digimon is at half HP or below they deal +3 bonus damage on all attacks.

abilities.name: Partner's Glow
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Courage rank 4
abilities.description: At the start of each of your turns, if your Digimon is digivolved above their Default Stage, you may spend 2 Hope to grant them +2 to their next attack roll AND +2 damage on that attack.

abilities.name: Biomerge Ready
abilities.description: Your Tamer may now participate in Biomerge Digivolution. See Part 2: Rules for full details. Additionally, when you initiate Biomerge, the corruption check gains +2 to the roll.
